changelog:
Talken 1.1

✨ Improvements:
- Offline messaging: messages now reach recipients when they next come online, even if you were offline when you sent them.
- Automatic account self-heal on login keeps your message sync reliable.

🐛 Bug Fixes:
- Made identity verification deterministic, resolving intermittent "invalid identity" errors that could block message delivery.

📝 Notes:
Thanks for using Talken!
